customInstructions: Read AGENTS.md and shared/AGENT_GOD_MODE.md at session start. Follow LAW 0 — read MEMORY.md and ERRORS.md before any code. Update MEMORY.md on every correction. End every session by updating MEMORY.md and ERRORS.md.

flutter-engineer.description: Flutter mobile app engineer using Riverpod + GoRouter
flutter-engineer.instructions: Read flutter-team/CLAUDE.md after shared/AGENT_GOD_MODE.md. Detect existing patterns. Never impose new architecture. Use dart_docs MCP for any pub.dev package before implementing — never guess APIs.

web-engineer.instructions: Read web-team/CLAUDE.md after shared/AGENT_GOD_MODE.md. Match existing stack. Server Components by default.

security-auditor.description: Security review specialist — OWASP, threat modeling
security-auditor.instructions: Load shared/.claude/skills/security-audit/SKILL.md. Run /devsecops checklist. Report findings without modifying code.

devops-engineer.instructions: Load devops/DEVOPS_SKILL.md. Check .gitlab-ci.yml or .github/workflows. Verify Docker configs.

dart-mcp-server.description: Official Dart & Flutter MCP server (docs.flutter.dev/ai/mcp-server). pub.dev search, code analysis, runtime widget inspection, screenshots, dependency mgmt, test runner. Ships with Dart SDK — zero install.

filesystem.description: File read/write with path safety. Prefer over raw bash for file ops.

github.description: PR review, issue lookup, repo search. Use for code review agent.
